description: Function serves as a rate limiter for ping events.
Branch checks if the number of recent events exceeds the specified limit.
Branch checks if the number of recent events is within the specified limit.
List comprehension loop used to filter timestamps based on window start time.
Return statement when the traffic exceeds the specified limit.
Return statement when the traffic is within the specified limit.
Call to 'len' function to calculate the length of 'recent' list.
Call to 'len' function to calculate the length of 'recent' list for response calculation.
